input.initialPrompt: Modernize this project to SDK-style format. Identify all legacy patterns and suggest how to simplify the project file.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to modernize a .NET project file from legacy format to SDK-style format. Let me start by examining the current project file and source files to understand what needs to change.

data.content:
Now I have a full picture. Here are all the legacy patterns and the modernization plan:

**Legacy patterns identified:**

| # | Pattern | Resolution |
|---|---------|------------|
| 1 | `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace on `<Project>` | Replace with `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` |
| 2 | Explicit `Microsoft.Common.props` import | Implicit in SDK-style |
| 3 | Explicit `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import | Implicit in SDK-style |
| 4 | `Configuration`/`Platform` default properties | SDK-style defaults |
| 5 | `ProjectGuid` | Not needed |
| 6 | `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | SDK defaults |
| 7 | Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` conditionals | SDK defaults match these exactly |
| 8 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK-style auto-globs `*.cs` |
| 9 | Explicit framework `<Reference>` items (System, System.Core, etc.) | Implicit for .NET Framework in SDK-style |
| 10 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Replaced by project-level properties; SDK auto-generates assembly attributes |
| 11 | `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | Becomes `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |

Let me apply the conversion now.

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a clear picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize the project file.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **Old-style `<Project>` element** with `ToolsVersion` and XML namespace — SDK-style uses `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Explicit `Microsoft.Common.props` import** — SDK-style handles this automatically
3. **Explicit `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import** — SDK-style handles this automatically
4. **Configuration/Platform conditionals with defaults** — SDK-style provides sensible defaults


5. **ProjectGuid, FileAlignment, AutoGenerateBindingRedirects, Deterministic** — all unnecessary in SDK-style
6. **Explicit `<Compile>` items and framework references** — SDK-style auto-includes C# files and implicit framework references
7. **Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs** — SDK-style generates this automatically
8. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** — I'll convert this to `TargetFramework` with `net472` to maintain .NET Framework compatibility while adopting the SDK-style format, keeping the runtime upgrade as a separate decision for the user.

I'm creating the modernized project file with the SDK attribute, essential properties like TargetFramework and assembly metadata, and omitting defaults like OutputType since Library is the standard for class libraries.

data.content:
Done. The project went from **47 lines → 11 lines**. Here's a summary of what changed:

**Removed (handled by SDK defaults):**
- XML declaration, `ToolsVersion`, MSBuild namespace
- `Microsoft.Common.props` and `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` imports
- `Configuration`/`Platform` defaults, `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`
- Debug & Release property groups (SDK defaults match exactly)
- All `<Compile>` items (SDK auto-globs `*.cs`)
- All `<Reference>` items (implicit for .NET Framework)
- `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` (assembly attributes now generated from project properties like `Version`, `Company`, `Copyright`, `Description`)

**Kept as project properties:**
- `TargetFramework` (converted from `v4.7.2` → `net472`)
- Assembly metadata migrated from `AssemblyInfo.cs` to project-level properties

`OutputType`, `RootNamespace`, and `AssemblyName` were also removed since their values (`Library`, `LegacyApp`, `LegacyApp`) match SDK defaults inferred from the `.csproj` filename.
